system.descriptor: Acrobatics covers feats of agile movement, balance, and flexibility beyond normal physical capability.
system.uses:
Uses: Leaping across gaps, keeping balance on narrow surfaces, contorting through tight spaces, reducing falling damage, performing flips and rolls.
Special Use: Contortionist: As a Full Action, make a +0 Acrobatics test to escape from bonds or restraints. Can only attempt once per set of restraints.
Special Use: Manoeuvring: As a Half Action, test Acrobatics to perform the function of the Disengage Action.
Special Use: Jumping: Can use Acrobatics in place of Agility or Strength tests for Jumping and Leaping.
Special Use: Reduce Falling Damage: Test Acrobatics to reduce effective fall distance by 1 metre per Degree of Success.

description.value: Acrobatics covers feats of agile movement, balance, and flexibility beyond normal physical capability.
